name: Scrap Synchron
name_jp: スクラップ・シンクロン
desc: For a Synchro Summon, you can substitute this card for any 1 "Synchron" Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Scrap Synchron" once per turn. If you Synchro Summon a monster that mentions a "Synchron" Tuner as material, this card in your hand can also be used as material. If a monster(s) you control (that mentions "Junk Warrior" or is a Synchro Monster with "Warrior" in its original name) would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead.
mnst_eff: For a Synchro Summon, you can substitute this card for any 1 "Synchron" Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Scrap Synchron" once per turn. If you Synchro Summon a monster that mentions a "Synchron" Tuner as material, this card in your hand can also be used as material. If a monster(s) you control (that mentions "Junk Warrior" or is a Synchro Monster with "Warrior" in its original name) would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead.
eff: For a Synchro Summon, you can substitute this card for any 1 "Synchron" Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Scrap Synchron" once per turn. If you Synchro Summon a monster that mentions a "Synchron" Tuner as material, this card in your hand can also be used as material. If a monster(s) you control (that mentions "Junk Warrior" or is a Synchro Monster with "Warrior" in its original name) would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can banish this card from your field or GY instead.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Power of Fellows Light of Gathering Stars Pack

action: Uses cards in the hand as Synchro Materials
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
